# R0 action combat plan fixture (synthetic gap analysis)

## Genre
action_combat — soulslike melee prototype

## SSOT
| State | Owner |
|-------|-------|
| HP/Stamina | USoulsCombatComponent |
| Input | ASoulsPlayerCharacter + DefaultInput.ini |
| GameMode spawn | ASoulsGameModeBase |

## Impacted files (slices)
1. SoulsPlayerCharacter.cpp/.h — fix LookXY camera, unify input
2. Config/DefaultGame.ini — set ASoulsGameModeBase, DefaultPawnClass
3. Config/DefaultInput.ini — Attack, MoveXY, LookXY mappings
4. Later: dodge/block component or method

## Risks
- Enhanced Input vs legacy BindAction mismatch
- GameMode not set — SpawnEntities never runs in PIE

## Build
UBT YourProjectEditor Win64 Development after each slice.
